--- Meet the Team ---
Meet the Team Dr. Inderdeep Hayer, DDS General Dentist – Cedar Hill, TX Dr.

Inderdeep Hayer is a passionate and dedicated General Dentist proudly serving the Cedar Hill, TX community. Known for her gentle touch and calm, patient-centered care, Dr. Hayer is committed to providing the highest standard of dental treatment in a comfortable and relaxing environment. She believes in empowering her patients through education, taking the time to explain all treatment options, discuss alternatives, and promote strong oral hygiene and preventative care practices. Dr.

Hayer earned her Doctor of Dental Medicine degree from Roseman University of Health Sciences, where she was actively involved in the Research Program. After graduation, she returned to Texas to gain hands-on experience and has been practicing in the Dallas Forthworth metroplex before acquiring SpringCrest Dental.

She carefully crafts each treatment plan based on the individual, ensuring patients receive care that aligns with both their health goals and lifestyle. Her philosophy is rooted in compassion, listening, and connection. She strives to treat every patient like family, building trust and easing dental anxieties through a warm and welcoming atmosphere. With a commitment to continuing education and clinical excellence, Dr.

Hayer stays current with the latest advancements to offer modern, effective, and personalized care. Outside the office, Dr. Hayer enjoys traveling with her family, cooking, and staying active at the gym. Join Dr. Hayer and the team at SpringCrest Dental—where your comfort, care, and confidence are at the heart of every smile.

--- Financing ---
Financing At SpringCrest Dental, we believe that everyone deserves access to quality oral care, which is why we offer a variety of financial options tailored to meet the needs of our community. From flexible payment plans to third-party financing, we strive to make dental services affordable and accessible for all.

--- About Us ---
About us Our team at SpringCrest Dental sees our patients as a part of our family.

--- Services ---
Services At Spring crest Dental, we strive to provide our patients with the best and most complete dental care. Our doctors and staff frequently attend continuing education seminars to learn the latest dental techniques. General Dentistry General dentistry encompasses a broad range of services aimed at maintaining and restoring oral health. Preventative Dentistry Preventative dentistry focuses on maintaining oral health through regular check-ups, cleanings.

Surgical Extraction Procedure to remove teeth that cannot be easily extracted due to position or root complexity. Wisdom Teeth Extraction Removal of the four permanent adult teeth located at the back corners of the mouth. Sedation Dentistry Use of medication to help patients relax during dental procedures. Laser Dentistry Use of lasers to perform various dental procedures with precision and minimal discomfort.

Dentures Custom-fitted replacements for missing teeth, available in full or partial sets. Orthodontics-Clear Aligners Invisible braces for discreetly straightening teeth without metal brackets. Emergency Dental Care Immediate decision and care necessary to prevent further harm in dental injuries. Pediatric Dentistry Dental care specifically designed for infants, children, and teenagers. Preventive Care Routine dental care to maintain oral health and prevent dental problems.

Root Canal Treatment Procedure to save a severely decayed or infected tooth by removing the damaged pulp. Teeth Whitening Professional treatments to lighten and brighten the color of teeth for a whiter smile. Crowns Custom-made caps that cover damaged teeth to restore their shape, size, and strength. Bridges Dental appliances that fill gaps left by missing teeth, anchored by adjacent teeth or implants. Partial Dentures Removable dental devices that replace multiple missing teeth in a partial arch.
